classification_boundary.ledger_impact_semantics: realized trade-row impact proxy only; no canonical ledger_impact_row introduced
classification_boundary.schema_target: regime-/policy-separated attribution cube over the fixed three-cohort RI surface
classification_boundary.source_surface: Slice 2 decision rows plus Slice 3 bounded trade/exit join artifact

metric_contract.decision_to_ledger_impact_proxy: decision -> observed open -> realized position -> realized trade event funnel; ledger impact remains a trade-row proxy in this slice
metric_contract.profit_factor: gross_profit / gross_loss_abs when gross_loss_abs > 0, else null with explicit mode
metric_contract.realized_drawdown_contribution_share: bucket gross_loss_abs / global gross_loss_abs; trade-realized loss proxy only, not a full equity-path drawdown row
metric_contract.stop_loss_share: stop_loss trade-event share over realized trade events
metric_contract.take_profit_share: take_profit trade-event share over realized trade events
metric_contract.trailing_stop_share: trailing_stop trade-event share over realized trade events
